forecasts.raw_text: SW winds 15 to 20 kt. Gusts up to 25 kt late. Seas 4 to 6 ft. Wave detail: S 5 ft at 5 seconds and E 4 ft at 10 seconds. Patchy fog late this evening and early morning.

forecasts.raw_text: SW winds 15 to 20 kt with gusts up to 25 kt, diminishing to 10 to 15 kt after midnight. Seas 5 to 7 ft, subsiding to 3 to 5 ft after midnight. Wave detail: S 6 ft at 6 seconds and E 4 ft at 10 seconds, becoming S 4 ft at 6 seconds and E 4 ft at 10 seconds. Showers with a chance of tstms in the evening, then showers likely with a slight chance of tstms after midnight. Patchy fog after midnight.
